'''鈭歨-dh-w''' ('''hadhawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:albitize|albitize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:albitize|albitize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-dh-w
|-
! Lemma
| hadhawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadhawithi|hadhawithi]] || [[word:hadhawiji|hadhawiji]] || [[word:hadhawishi|hadhawishi]] || [[word:hadhawi|hadhawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhawuthuth|hadhawuthuth]] || [[word:hadhawujuj|hadhawujuj]] || [[word:hadhawushush|hadhawushush]] || [[word:hadhaw|hadhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhawuthu|hadhawuthu]] || [[word:hadhawuju|hadhawuju]] || [[word:hadhawushu|hadhawushu]] || [[word:hadhawu|hadhawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhawufuth|hadhawufuth]] || [[word:hadhawufuj|hadhawufuj]] || [[word:hadhawufush|hadhawufush]] || [[word:hadhawuf|hadhawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadhawethe|hadhawethe]] || [[word:hadhaweje|hadhaweje]] || [[word:hadhaweshe|hadhaweshe]] || [[word:hadhawe|hadhawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhawothoth|hadhawothoth]] || [[word:hadhawojoj|hadhawojoj]] || [[word:hadhawoshosh|hadhawoshosh]] || [[word:hadhaw|hadhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhawotho|hadhawotho]] || [[word:hadhawojo|hadhawojo]] || [[word:hadhawosho|hadhawosho]] || [[word:hadhawo|hadhawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhawofoth|hadhawofoth]] || [[word:hadhawofoj|hadhawofoj]] || [[word:hadhawofosh|hadhawofosh]] || [[word:hadhawof|hadhawof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadhaw忙th忙|hadhaw忙th忙]] || [[word:hadhaw忙j忙|hadhaw忙j忙]] || [[word:hadhaw忙sh忙|hadhaw忙sh忙]] || [[word:hadhaw忙|hadhaw忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhawathath|hadhawathath]] || [[word:hadhawajaj|hadhawajaj]] || [[word:hadhawashash|hadhawashash]] || [[word:hadhaw|hadhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhawatha|hadhawatha]] || [[word:hadhawaja|hadhawaja]] || [[word:hadhawasha|hadhawasha]] || [[word:hadhawa|hadhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhawafath|hadhawafath]] || [[word:hadhawafaj|hadhawafaj]] || [[word:hadhawafash|hadhawafash]] || [[word:hadhawaf|hadhawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hadhawasha|hadhawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohadhawasha|gohadhawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihadhawasha|gokihadhawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hadhawn眉sha|hadhawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohadhawnkn眉sha|gohadhawnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihadhawn眉sha|gokihadhawn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadhawsh毛sha|hadhawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadhawnksh毛sha|gohadhawnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadhawsh毛sha|gokihadhawsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadhawrosha|hadhawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadhawnkrosha|gohadhawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadhawrosha|gokihadhawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhawmusha|hadhawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadhawnkmusha|gohadhawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhawmusha|gokihadhawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hadhawsherasha|hadhawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohadhawnksherasha|gohadhawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihadhawsherasha|gokihadhawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hadhawngasha|hadhawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohadhawnkngasha|gohadhawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihadhawngasha|gokihadhawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hadhawyasha|hadhawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohadhawnkyasha|gohadhawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihadhawyasha|gokihadhawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hadhawyamasha|hadhawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohadhawnkyamasha|gohadhawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihadhawyamasha|gokihadhawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadhawn眉sh毛sha|hadhawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadhawnkn眉sh毛sha|gohadhawnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadhawn眉sh毛sha|gokihadhawn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadhawn眉rosha|hadhawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadhawnkn眉rosha|gohadhawnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadhawn眉rosha|gokihadhawn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhawn眉musha|hadhawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadhawnkn眉musha|gohadhawnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhawn眉musha|gokihadhawn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadhawsh毛n眉sha|hadhawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadhawnksh毛n眉sha|gohadhawnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadhawsh毛n眉sha|gokihadhawsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadhawsh毛rosha|hadhawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadhawnksh毛rosha|gohadhawnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadhawsh毛rosha|gokihadhawsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhawsh毛musha|hadhawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadhawnksh毛musha|gohadhawnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhawsh毛musha|gokihadhawsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadhawron眉sha|hadhawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadhawnkron眉sha|gohadhawnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadhawron眉sha|gokihadhawron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadhawrosh毛sha|hadhawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadhawnkrosh毛sha|gohadhawnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadhawrosh毛sha|gokihadhawrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadhawromusha|hadhawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadhawnkromusha|gohadhawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadhawromusha|gokihadhawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadhawmun眉sha|hadhawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadhawnkmun眉sha|gohadhawnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadhawmun眉sha|gokihadhawmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadhawmush毛sha|hadhawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadhawnkmush毛sha|gohadhawnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadhawmush毛sha|gokihadhawmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadhawmurosha|hadhawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadhawnkmurosha|gohadhawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadhawmurosha|gokihadhawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hadhaw|hadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙dh忙w|h忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohadhaw|hohadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙dh忙w|hoh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohadhaw|hohohadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙dh忙w|hohoh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hadhaw|n眉hadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙dh忙w|n眉h忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hadhaw|n眉n眉hadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙dh忙w|n眉n眉h忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hadhaw|n茂hadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙dh忙w|n茂h忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hadhaw|n茂n茂hadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙dh忙w|n茂n茂h忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhadhaw|luhadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙dh忙w|luh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhadhaw|luluhadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙dh忙w|luluh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihadhaw|lihadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙dh忙w|lih忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihadhaw|lilihadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙dh忙w|lilih忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohadhaw|kohadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙dh忙w|koh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohadhaw|kokohadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙dh忙w|kokoh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehadhaw|kehadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙dh忙w|keh忙dh忙w]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehadhaw|kekehadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙dh忙w|kekeh忙dh忙w]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
